serena_lsp_status: OPERATIONAL since 2026-05-07. 23 tools stable for 11 runs (Runs 4-14). find_symbol --name_path_pattern (NOT --name_path); find_referencing_symbols --name_path (NOT --name_path_pattern) — Run 14 confirmed inconsistency. JSON stdin pipe with '.' sentinel. get_symbols_overview ~100ms; focused find_referencing_symbols ~2.3s; broad find_symbol 70s+ (prefer Grep); activate_project ~7s cold.

established_patterns.options_struct_model: CompileConfig in pkg/cli/compile_pipeline.go is the refactor model
established_patterns.production_goroutine_convention: defer recover() per update_check.go:273 — UNIVERSAL adoption as of Run 14
established_patterns.pkg_constants_grouping: pkg/constants/constants.go is canonical for Default* constants. FilePerm/DirPerm/DefaultHTTPClientTimeout all landed here.
established_patterns.helper_underadoption_failure_mode: Persistent thread across Runs 5/7/8/9/10/11/12/13: helper exists but call sites bypass via literal duplication OR different-shape construction OR linter is informational-only. Re-audit cadence ~7 days catches most adoption rollouts.
established_patterns.context_propagation_pattern: Correct at actionpins.go:317: cmp.Or(ctx.Ctx, context.Background()). context.Background() ONLY at top-level boundaries.
established_patterns.non_context_convenience_wrapper: github_cli.go RunGH/RunGHContext: short-name wrapper creates Background and calls Context variant. Defensible.
established_patterns.init_function_criteria: Acceptable: analyzer flag registration, wasm build-tag overrides, embedded JSON load, map derivation from package-level data. NOT acceptable: log-only stub bodies whose comments admit work was removed.
established_patterns.mutex_unlock_idiom: defer mu.Unlock() dominant (~85% post-Run-12 fix). Manual Unlock fragile to future early-return additions UNLESS intentional release-before-slow-call (spinner.Quit + Wait, debounce timer parallel compile).
established_patterns.cache_state_struct_consolidation: Run 12-13: syncutil.OnceLoader[T] is the generic helper. Adopted in pkg/cli/repo.go:16 + pkg/workflow/repository_features_validation.go:67. Model for future cross-package singleflight cache consolidation.
established_patterns.errstringmatch_resolution_pattern: Run 14 confirmed two acceptable resolutions: (1) refactor into helper accepting string parameter then call as helper(err.Error()) — silences linter while centralizing the brittle match logic (audit.go isPermissionErrorStr, logs_download.go isNonZip/isCaseCollision); (2) //nolint:errstringmatch with single-line justification comment naming the upstream (gh CLI, gronx, GitHub GraphQL) that exposes the state only as text. Both are documented escape hatches.
established_patterns.errorutil_helper_shape: errorutil.IsNotFoundError is the model: returns false for nil, ToLower(err.Error()), Contains-OR of numeric status AND english phrase.
established_patterns.syscall_discard_defensibility_test: Run 14 framework: a `_ = syscall(...)` is defensible IF AND ONLY IF (a) the callee itself logs the error internally before returning it (saveActionCache, purgeOrphanedLockFiles, updateGitAttributes), OR (b) the discard is documented inline as best-effort with explicit doc-comment (mcp_tools_privileged.go notifyProgress), OR (c) the call is in an error-cleanup defer where the primary error is already being returned (pr_helpers.go switchBranch x4, git.go stageWorkflowChanges), OR (d) the API contract makes failure impossible-in-practice at init time (cobra MarkHidden/MarkDeprecated/MarkFlagRequired). The 10 sites in #aw_sg14a1 (os.Setenv x4, os.Chdir x6) meet NONE of these criteria.
established_patterns.implicit_defer_discard_anti_pattern: Run 14: `defer fn(args)` where fn returns error implicitly discards the error without an explicit `_ =`. Worse than explicit `_ =` because Go's errcheck linter may miss it. Confirmed in trial_repository.go:211,230,540, trial_helpers.go:326. Fix: replace with `defer func() { _ = fn(args) }()` or a logged helper.

bash_policy_limits: Workspace shell blocks multi-statement scripts and awk on /dev/null. mkdir/ls outside /home/runner/work/gh-aw/gh-aw blocked. gh CLI returns 403 on /meta - no /api/v3 access from agent (no duplicate detection via gh issue list). Use Write tool over heredoc append. Compound 'mkdir && ls' is split-checked - issue separate calls. `go build` blocked by sandbox; static analysis via Grep+Read+Serena only. Output redirection (>>) to /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory blocked; use Write tool to overwrite file.
